theme_strategy: Light Theme Default - 'Organic & Earthy / Soft Utility' archetype. The design must feel highly professional, reliable, and approachable. Avoid generic SaaS 'Blue'. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: Purple/Violet, Teal Green, Teal Blue (#1B93A4).

rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, Lato, or Space Grotesk.
Overlines/table headers must be uppercase, tiny, and wide-spaced.
Primary Accent (#D95E36 - Terracotta/Rust) is reserved STRICTLY for the Commission tab highlights, primary CTA buttons (e.g., 'Add Trip', 'Generate Invoice'), and revenue metrics.
Never use pure #000000. Use tinted deep charcoal (#1A1A1A).
Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not put light gray text on white.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing System. Use 2x more whitespace than default.
rules: Grid items must be direct children of the grid container.
Never center-align dense content like tables, paragraphs, or forms. Left-align them.
Numeric values in tables (Freight, Commission) must be right-aligned.

components.cards: Subtle border (1px solid border-color), NO soft fuzzy shadows. Use rounded-md (6px radius) or flat rectangles. Hover effect: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
components.tables: Cardless style preferred. Sharp edges, 1px border on bottom of rows, no vertical borders. Ample row padding (py-4 px-2).
components.buttons: Pill-shaped or rounded-md. Primary: bg-primary_accent text-white hover:bg-primary_accent_hover. Secondary: bg-surface_muted text-text_primary hover:bg-border.
components.sidebar_navigation: Fixed left sidebar. Background: surface_muted (#F0F0EA). Active link indicated by a bold text and a left-border highlight of primary_accent.
components.forms: Use Shadcn components. Inputs should have clear borders (#E5E5E0) and focus rings (ring-1 ring-primary_accent).
components.modals_dialogs: Solid background, sharp drop-shadow, 1px border. NO heavy glassmorphism for this operations tool.

pages_and_views.Dashboard: High-density grid. Top cards: Total Commission (Highlighted), Active Trips, Pending Payments. Middle: Mini line-chart of 30-day commission. Bottom: Recent Trips table.
pages_and_views.Vehicles_and_Drivers: Data tables with quick 'Add' side-drawers or modals. Tags for vehicle types.
pages_and_views.Parties: Unified list with toggle/tabs for 'Transporters' vs 'Consignors'.
pages_and_views.Trips: The core operational table. Columns: ID, Date, Route (From-To), Transporter, Party, Freight, Comm %, Comm Amount, Status. Statuses should use distinct badge colors.
pages_and_views.Commission: THE HERO SECTION. Large typography for 'Total Earned'. Area chart for monthly revenue. List of pending commissions vs received. Use the primary_accent color generously here to make it feel rewarding.
pages_and_views.Invoices_PDF: Clean, printable view. Use standard web printing (window.print() with @media print CSS) or a library like jspdf to generate a clean A4 layout containing Trip details, Freight, Brokerage/Commission.

visual_enhancers.charts: Use 'recharts'. Maintain minimalist styling (hide grid lines, use single brand color for bars/lines, clean tooltips).
visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: Add transition-transform duration-200 to buttons and table rows.
visual_enhancers.empty_states: Do not just show 'No data'. Use a muted icon, a short friendly message, and a clear CTA button.

icons_and_assets.icon_rules: Use regular or duotone weights. Keep sizes consistent (e.g., size={20} for nav, size={16} for buttons). NEVER use emoji characters for icons.

broker_avatar.description: Professional businessman avatar to be used in the top-right profile/header section.

empty_state_bg.description: Clean truck on the road. Can be used as a faint watermark or for the initial welcome/onboarding screen.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for standard text. Test Terracotta text on white.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, tabs) MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-trip-button').
accessibility_and_testing.focus_states: Explicit focus states required for keyboard navigation (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary_accent focus:outline-none).

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a React.js application. Use .js and .jsx files exclusively. DO NOT use .tsx or TypeScript.
Implement the layout with a fixed left sidebar and a main scrollable content area.
Since it is a single-user app with no auth, route '/' should load directly into the Dashboard.
Use Shadcn UI components but heavily customize their Tailwind classes to match the 'Organic & Earthy / Soft Utility' theme.
Build a robust routing system (e.g., React Router) to navigate between Dashboard, Trucks, Drivers, Parties, Trips, Commission, and Expenses.
The 'Commission' tab must feel distinct and rewarding, using larger fonts and the Terracotta accent color.
Ensure the invoice feature has a 'Download PDF' or 'Print' button that strips away the sidebar and UI, rendering a clean printable invoice.
Avoid centering layouts. Maintain a structured, left-aligned, bento-box-like grid.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT use universal transitions (e.g., 'transition: all'). Target specific properties.
Avoid generic, 'AI slop' aesthetics. No simplistic full-screen gradients.
Create depth through 1px crisp borders, subtle color shifts on hover, and thoughtful z-index hierarchy, NOT through muddy drop-shadows.
Use specific Phosphor or Lucide icons; never use AI assistant emojis.
Use the 'sonner' library for toast notifications.
Prioritize using existing UI components before building from scratch.
